context_auto-refresh-description: Automatically update pages with highly dynamic content
context_recent-clusters-description: Recently visited clusters appear at the top of cluster menu.
context_recent-pages-description: Recently visited pages appear at the top of pages menu.
context_regular-user-ui-description: There is some difference in UI for development-team and regular users, enabling of the option allows to see exactly the same what see a regular user.
context_ai-chat-description: Show AI chat button on all pages
context_decode-utf8-description: Attempt to decode UTF-8 strings. Show Unicode symbols upon success and mark data as binary otherwise.
context_decode-utf8-highlight: Please note that YSON does not natively support Unicode symbols — therefore you would not be able to copy-paste presented YSON as is.
context_binary-as-hex-description: Display binary strings as HEX sequences. Strings that were not decoded as UTF8 are therefore considered binary and displayed as HEX sequences.
context_escape-whitespaces-description: Symbols {{n}} and {{t}} will be rendered as escape sequences, whitespaces will be highlighted as neccessary. Does not affect Raw JSON format.
context_escape-whitespaces-highlight: Please note that JSON does not support unescaped control characters — therefore you would not be able to copy-paste presented JSON as is.
context_compact-view-description: Single element lists are rendered inline, so are maps with one property. Does not affect Raw JSON format.
context_host-type-description: Select the default view of host to display on in the Masters/Schedulers and Controller agents section.
context_statistics-type-description: Select the default type of job aggregation.
context_default-path-description: Cluster specific path that will be opened by default in the the Navigation page.
context_default-chyt-alias-description: User alias for the YQL Kit default query string in ClickHouse mode.
context_smart-sort-description: Nodes with names that represent dates will be sorted from newest date to oldest, while other nodes will be sorted alphabetically.
context_group-nodes-description: Nodes will be grouped by type and each type will be sorted independently, folders first, then tables, then files.
context_smart-filter-description: Use logical operators in filter like "and" and "or"
context_enable-side-bar-description: Display node data in the side bar when clicked.
context_show-empty-categories-descriptio: Display all memory categories even with 0B
context_rows-per-page-description: Select the default number of rows to display on one table page. The number can be changed for the specific table using table settings button.
context_cell-size-limit-description: Select the default cell size limit for tables. The cell size limit for the specific table can be changed using table settings button.
context_default-column-limit-description: Select the default column limit for tables. In other words, how many columns will be shown when no column has even been hidden using ColumnSelector for the particular table or (if table similarity is enabled) for the similar table.
context_guess-visible-columns-descriptio: Use table similarity for guessing visible columns. Show same visible columns in table A as in table B if these tables are similar and those columns have been previously set as visible for table B.
context_raw-strings-description: Cells with string values will be displayed without escaping.
